description: Style NotePure police Passion Woman, for women, is an oriental floral fragnance that comes in a pink flacon with a flower symbol.Product DetailsTop notes are bergamot, orange, cassis and granny smith apple middle notes are lotus, hawthorn, freesia and sunflower base notes are musk, sandalwood, virginia cedar, tonka bean, vanille and caramelCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
